zh.lifeSummary: 當George Hilles於1534年出生在英國素可洛瑟費爾德時，他的父親John Rotherfield Hilles34歲，母親Mrs. John Hilles35歲。他於1559年7月12日與Anne Agnes Dennyng在英國英格蘭素可洛瑟費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1603年2月在他的家鄉享年69歲，埋葬在英國素可洛瑟費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Hilles于1534年出生在英国素可洛瑟費爾德时，他的父亲John Rotherfield Hilles34岁，母亲Mrs. John Hilles35岁。他于1559年7月12日与Anne Agnes Dennyng在英国英格兰素可洛瑟費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1603年2月在他的家乡享年69岁，埋葬在英国素可洛瑟費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Hilles
meanings: Hilles or hylles, genitives of hill and hyll, a hill, meaning belonging to a hill

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When George Hilles was born in 1534, in Rotherfield, Sussex, England, his father, John Rotherfield Hilles, was 34 and his mother, Mrs. John Hilles, was 35. He married Anne Agnes Dennyng on 12 July 1559, in Rotherfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died in February 1603, in his hometown, at the age of 69, and was buried in Rotherfield, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Hilles est né en 1534, à Rotherfield, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Rotherfield Hilles, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Hilles, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Anne Agnes Dennyng le 12 juillet 1559, à Rotherfield, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en février 1603, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Rotherfield, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Hilles 1534 in Rotherfield, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Rotherfield Hilles 34 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Hilles 35. Er hat am 12. Juli 1559 in Rotherfield, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Anne Agnes Dennyng geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1603 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rotherfield, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Hilles è nato il nel 1534 nel Rotherfield, Sussex, England, il suo padre, John Rotherfield Hilles, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Hilles, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Anne Agnes Dennyng il 12 luglio 1559, nel Rotherfield, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel febbraio 1603, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Rotherfield, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: George Hillesが1534年にイギリススセックスロスエルフィールドで生まれた時，父John Rotherfield Hillesは34歳，母Mrs. John Hillesは35歳であった。1559年7月12日にイギリスイギリススセックスロスエルフィールドでAnne Agnes Dennyngと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1603年2月に故郷で69歳で死去し，イギリススセックスロスエルフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Hilles(이)가 1534년 영국 수세스 로더필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Rotherfield Hilles(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Hilles(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1559년 7월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 로더필드에서 Anne Agnes Dennyng(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1603년 2월 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 로더필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Hilles nasceu em 1534, em Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Rotherfield Hilles, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Hilles, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Agnes Dennyng em 12 de julho de 1559, em Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1603, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Hilles родился в 1534 г. в местности ротирфиелд, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Rotherfield Hilles было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Hilles, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Agnes Dennyng 12 июля 1559 г. в местности ротирфиелд, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер февраль 1603 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности ротирфиелд, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Anne Agnes Dennyng el 12 de julio de 1559, en Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1603, en su pueblo, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra.
